name: io.github.cyberlife-coder/velesdb-memory
title: VelesDB Memory
description: Local-first memory for AI agents: remember/recall/relate/forget/why over a fused vector+graph+columnar engine. why() connects decisions across sessions, offline, in one tiny binary.

environmentVariables.name: VELESDB_MEMORY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Directory where the local memory store lives (the memory never leaves this machine).

environmentVariables.name: VELESDB_MEMORY_EMBEDDER
environmentVariables.description: Embedding backend: 'hash' (default, offline, zero-dep) or 'ollama' (real semantic recall via a local model; binary must be built --features ollama).
